description_long: This is a rectangular, upright grocery bag with a matte black exterior and a subtle repeating pattern. The bag features two sturdy, flat white handles attached to the top, allowing for easy carrying. In the lower left corner of the front face, there is a white printed logo reading 'ivy HYGIENE SOLUTIONS.' The bag appears to be made of thick paper or lightweight cardboard, giving it a semi-rigid structure while remaining lightweight. The interior is not visible, but the bag seems empty as it maintains a flat, unbulging shape. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for retail or promotional use in urban environments.
description: A matte black rectangular grocery bag with white flat handles and a printed 'ivy HYGIENE SOLUTIONS' logo on the front. The bag is empty and maintains a crisp, semi-rigid shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'ivy HYGIENE SOLUTIONS' logo and both white handles clearly.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front but without any visible logo or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the bag's slim profile and handle attachment.
attribute_branding_or_logo: White 'ivy HYGIENE SOLUTIONS' logo printed on the lower left front.
